heroTitle: Latest run first. Week second. Next move after that.
heroBody: run.nico.ar reads exported training data and turns it into a calmer post-run view: what just happened, how the week is trending, and what should come next.
conceptTitle: After the watch, before the next session
conceptBody: Training explained, not just recorded. This is the quiet reading layer on top of Pacer: static, personal, and built to stay useful after the workout is over.
conceptPoints: Reads prepared exports instead of calling live APIs from the frontend.
Lets Pacer do the heavy lifting while run.nico.ar stays lightweight.
Keeps a compact output ready for future e-ink and ESP32 views.
builtOn: Built on Raspberry Pi 5. Served lightly on Pi Zero 2 W.
